div.div:
Cut into clips → Annotation-RD (10 rechecks per chunk, full duration) → agreement ≥ K
⇒ easy-theft set
clips of 10s with ss overlap=
30 simu × 1h ≈ 67k clips
non-detetced theft: dvr footage

div.div:
PB1 — Video ↔ probability mapping
Align per-second proba with 10s clips;
wall-clock offset between proba files and chunks.
(simulation branch only)

div.div:
Simulation branch
Replay with proba history at sensitivity level 1
→ spotted vs missed thefts
⇒ easy-miss set + recall report

div.div:
Non-detected branch
No proba history → all entries are missed by definition (client-reported)
Apply easy filter (agreement ≥ K)
⇒ easy-miss set (no recall computable)

div.div:
Run improved / candidate model on the dataset → new probas → recompute recall
⇒ updated easy-miss report (model vN)

div.div:
PB2 — Threshold computing (new model)
No proba history for the new model →
can't apply sensitivity → TR → threshold mapping.
